title: AML Monitoring Alerts Logic (Old logic)
body_markdown:
**(Old logic)** - last updated 2022. Alert rule catalog: DC1-DC21, OB6-OB20.

DC1: 6 month > 100K USD. Triggers on Deposit. Status: Live (per 2022 doc).
DC2: Lifetime Deposit > 100K USD with annual and 12-month tests.
DC3: Lifetime Deposit > 500K USD.
DC4: 12 months > 150% from declared - "How much money do you plan to invest in your eToro
account in the next year?" by 150%. Status: Live - Handled Via Preliminary.
DC7: Daily Deposit > 50K. DC8/DC9: High-Risk BinCountry MOP for deposit/CO.
DC14: > 3 undefined credit cards w/ > 50K deposits in 6 months.
DC20: NAB/Westpac wire < $5k SWIFT.
DC21: > 250K, < 500K total deposits (FCA + ASIC only).
OB6/7/8: KYC mismatches (Student/Retiree/Age vs income).
OB12 FINRA. OB13: High Risk Occupation. OB14/15/18/19: EU/Non-EU geo mismatches.
OB20: Forbidden Regulation Change - Not Live, awaiting AML.

These alerts populate `BI_DB_dbo.BI_DB_AML_Daily_Alerts`. Most reference Customer KYC answers
from `V_CustomerAnswersNrml` and customer status / deposit aggregates from `DWH_dbo.Dim_Customer`
and `DWH_dbo.Fact_BillingDeposit`.

(Old logic) - newer AML alerts logic exists but no current canonical page found in this corpus.
